commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a resolved model runtime descriptor and threads model api/baseUrl/provider refs through resolution, embedded auth, runtime planning, provider synthetic auth hooks, and Ollama synthetic auth handling.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection, not by a live repro in this review. Current main infers auth/runtime facts from provider/model strings, while the PR adds tests and plumbing for selected model api/baseUrl facts.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the plugin auth API contract and contributor-side real behavior proof; no narrow ClawSweeper code repair remains after the current force push.

target.title: refactor(agents): carry resolved model runtime through auth
target.body:
Opened on behalf of Onur Solmaz (@osolmaz). Work in progress draft PR.

AI-assisted implementation requested by a maintainer.

## Summary

Carry a resolved model runtime descriptor from model resolution into embedded-run auth and runtime planning.

This keeps the provider the user selected, the concrete model transport that OpenClaw resolved, and the auth/provider refs together instead of making auth and runtime planning infer them again later.

Refs #80487.

## What Changed

- Added a resolved model runtime descriptor with provider/model ref, effective transport, auth provider refs, and source metadata.
- Updated sync and async model resolution to return that descriptor alongside the existing resolved model.
- Passed resolved runtime auth facts into embedded-run credential resolution, synthetic provider auth, and synthetic-profile defer hooks.
- Let provider runtime auth hooks use explicit resolved provider refs when available.
- Built the agent runtime plan from the resolved descriptor after runtime model updates.

## Testing

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/auth-controller.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.test.ts src/plugins/provider-runtime.test.ts src/plugins/provider-runtime.synthetic-auth-discovery.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-auth.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/resolved-model-runtime.types.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/resolved-model-runtime.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/model.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/auth-controller.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/auth-controller.test.ts src/agents/model-auth.ts src/agents/model-auth.test.ts src/plugins/provider-runtime.ts src/plugins/provider-external-auth.types.ts src/plugins/types.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `node --import tsx scripts/check-import-cycles.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_MODEL=qwen2.5:3b OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_WEB_SEARCH=0 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts -t "runs native chat"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: custom/router-backed model selections now carry the final resolved transport/auth facts into auth and runtime planning, so a provider default no longer has to stand in for a per-model runtime choice.

Real environment tested: local source checkout with Node/pnpm dependencies installed; local Ollama installed and serving `qwen2.5:3b`; no external provider secrets printed or committed.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran the focused resolver/auth/provider-runtime test group, core and core-test tsgo lanes, formatting check, whitespace check, import-cycle check, and one live Ollama native chat test listed above.

Evidence after fix: focused test group passed 8 files / 357 tests; model-auth rerun passed 2 files / 108 tests; tsgo commands exited 0; oxfmt check passed; `git diff --check` exited 0; import-cycle check reported 0 runtime value cycles; live Ollama run passed 1 test with 3 skipped by filter.

Observed result after fix: the resolver returns runtime metadata for per-model `api` and `baseUrl` overrides, the embedded auth controller forwards those auth facts, synthetic auth can resolve from the selected model's runtime API/base URL, and Ollama native chat still works against the local model.

What was not tested: full remote `pnpm check:changed` proof is blocked in this environment because Blacksmith Testbox is unavailable (`blacksmith` CLI missing) and direct AWS Crabbox has no usable AWS credentials/IMDS identity. Live Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI auth-profile smokes were not run in this local draft pass.

## Risks

- This is an internal descriptor plumbing change, so the main risk is stale callers continuing to infer runtime facts from only provider/model strings.
- Plugin auth hook contexts receive additive optional fields only.
target.author: dutifulbob
